note: runner1 thread: SynchronizedRunner::runSynchronized(agg1) collects IRunnableObject list at start
runner2 thread: SynchronizedRunner::runSynchronized(agg2) collects IRunnableObject list at start
runner2: after completing INIT stage successfully in runSynchronized, flush is called
master: SynchronizedRunnerMaster::runStage times out waiting for the second runner; CPSLOG_ERROR triggers stream
runner1: completes slow INIT stage (~2s) and then flushes despite master having set failure
